scores.correctness_notes: The agent correctly identifies IngressPerAppRequirer (mentioned in gold standard) and uses v2, but misses the gold standard's focus: the data schema (application databag: name/model/port; unit databag: host) and the explicit note that charmlibs docs cover interface specs/data contracts rather than Python API. The agent inverts the emphasis entirely.
scores.hallucination_notes: Several items are unverifiable against the gold standard source: IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent event class names; is_ready() method; strip_prefix, redirect_https, scheme constructor parameters; event.url attribute. The gold standard explicitly states the Python API is not documented in charmlibs but in the traefik-k8s-operator repo, so these detailed API specifics likely go beyond what the source documents and may be fabricated or extrapolated from memory.
